initial_entry.name: Narrate
initial_entry.author: jade
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Reads your markdown notes aloud via a local OpenAI-compatible TTS server (e.g. OpenVox). Select a sentence for a quick play button, with chunk prefetching for gapless playback, a draggable toolbar, table/parens/code filters, and WAV export.
